overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exiting the ocean and walking along a stormy beach at dusk, transitioning through grassy coastal hills and encountering dead creatures and bodies in a dark, atmospheric landscape.

events.description: character exits shallow ocean water onto the sandy beach

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks out of the ocean water onto the shore and proceeds along the beach

entered.detail: dark stormy water with waves lapping at the shore
steep rocky cliff covered with grass
wet sand and pebbles along the waterline

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the dark ocean water onto a stormy beach at dusk. The camera follows from behind as he walks along the shoreline, with waves crashing to the right and a grassy rocky cliff rising to the left.

events.description: transition from sandy beach to grassy terrain
dead sea creature becomes visible on the beach

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the beach passing dead sea creatures and moving toward grassy dunes

entered.detail: large deceased sea animal washed up on the sand
tall grass growing on coastal dunes

segments.scene_description: Walking along the stormy beach, Geralt passes a large dead sea creature lying on the sand. The terrain gradually transitions from beach to grassy dunes as the ocean recedes to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy coastal hills with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks uphill through grassy terrain toward rocky formations

entered.detail: large rock formations emerging from the grassy hills
misty mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Leaving the beach behind, Geralt ascends through grassy coastal hills. Rocky outcrops emerge from the terrain and distant mountains become visible through the stormy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassland with scattered rocks and dead bodies

events.description: dead body visible in the grass
approaching large rock formations and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues through grassland passing dead bodies and approaching rocky mountain terrain

entered.detail: humanoid corpse lying in the grass with visible blood
tall jagged rock spires and cliffs

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open grassland, Geralt passes a dead body lying in the grass. The landscape features scattered rocks and large rock formations ahead, with mountains looming in the misty distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt transitions from a stormy shoreline into a desolate, mountainous highland at dusk. It begins with him emerging from the dark ocean water, moving along a beach where crashing waves flank the right and rocky cliffs rise to the left. As he continues forward, the camera passes a massive dead sea creature on the sand while the terrain gradually shifts from the shoreline into grassy dunes. The scene then opens up as Geralt ascends through coastal hills and rocky outcrops, revealing distant mountains through the stormy atmosphere. Finally, the movement leads through open grasslands past a fallen body, heading toward looming rock formations and misty peaks in the distance.
